sources.title: King Uncle 1993 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Chapters Esub
King Uncle 1994 Dv DRip X 264 AAC 5.1 Chapters Esub

metadata.Plot: Stern, strict and prestigious Ashok Bansal is an industrialist and the eldest in the Bansal family. He is a very strict man especially when it comes to his family, his younger brother, Anil, and sister Sunita who must all follow his rules and regulations pattern. Fail to act proactively and abide by these rules Anil decides to run away from home with an orphan named Kavita and seeks employment in a garage. His sister who loves a peon named Kamal is forced to marry the alcoholic, cruel, abusive and womanizer Pradeep Malik. Soon a run-away orphan named Munna ended up in Ashok's house. Where she decides to mend his ways. Will she be successful in doing so?
metadata.Writer: Anees Bazmee, Ravi Kapoor, Mohan Kaul
metadata.Actors: Jackie Shroff, Shah Rukh Khan, Nagma
